stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
A pilot is planning an IFR flight and intends to fly from point LONAM to VENAS via airway L7. In the AIP route remarks, the following note regarding the route exists: LONAM - VENAS CDR 1 Mon-Thu 2300-0700. Decoding the previous note, which statement is correct?

options.a: It requires aircraft to have Conventional Direct Routing capability.
options.b: This route CANNOT be used for flight planning, but may be used tactically at the discretion of ATC.
options.c: During the specified period, this route is NOT available for flight planning.
options.d: It is a conditional route permanently plannable during the mentioned times.
